title: acrostichum sorbifolium var. japurense
intro: Acrostichum sorbifolium var. japurense, also known as Japurema fern, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Marattiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Japurema fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant, including infusions and decoctions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
